display_text: Telescope, Cost: 0: Grants Prescient Aura (Passive). Lowers Scan cooldown by 50%. Grants +75 attack range (Ranged only) and +100 cast range to all allies within a 1200 radius. This item is focused entirely on team utility, providing significant global vision control and positioning advantages for all allied heroes. The increased cast range allows spellcasters to use abilities from much safer distances, while the attack range bonus significantly extends the threat range of ranged heroes, enabling them to safely poke and siege objectives.
